steps.title: Solve the equation
steps.content: Add $|x-8|$ to both sides: $2|x-8|=20$, so $|x-8|=10$. This gives $x=18$ or $x=-2$.

steps.title: Sum the solutions
steps.content:
Add: $18+(-2)=16$. (Or use the shortcut: solutions of $|x-a|=b$ sum to $2a=16$.)

The answer is 16.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: As a final check, make sure the computed value answers exactly what the question asks for. The work above gives $16$; substituting or interpreting it in the original condition satisfies the requirement, so $16$ is the value to enter.
